title: Installed Apps not working
excerpt: Has anyone else had issues of apps not working? They are appearing in the installed apps, mostly, but if I try to add one to a board, it doesn’t load.

posts.author: odelegacy (Calvin Ode)
posts.cookedHtml: Has anyone else had issues of apps not working? They are appearing in the installed apps, mostly, but if I try to add one to a board, it doesn’t load.

posts.author: Dwolffe (Darian wolffe)
posts.cookedHtml: Is it an app with a free trial period? If the trial period ends, it won’t load.

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @odelegacy,

Sorry to hear you’re running into some trouble with your installed apps!

Do you mind letting me know which ones you’re seeing not load? Do you see any error messages at all? Or is it just a blank screen?

Any additional screenshots or screen recordings (using something like loom.com) could also help us better understand the issue you’re facing.

Thank you!

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @odelegacy,

Since it’s been a while since we last heard from you, I’m going to mark my last comment as the solution.

If the issue is still ongoing for you, feel free to make a comment within a week, or start a new thread.

Thanks!

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
